characters.name: Ignacio Valdez
characters.description: Ignacio ValdezAliasesUnknownRelativesRicky Solano (ex-husband)Donatello Valdez(half-brother)Samantha Valdez(half-sister)Delfina Valdez(younger sister)Jonas Meade-Valdez(half-brother)Soledad Valdez(half-sister)Caridad Valdez(half-sister)Diego Valdez(father)Anya Valdez(mother)Esperanza Valdez(step-mother)Lizzie Valdez(half-niece)Anna Valdez(half-niece)Elsa Valdez(half-niece)Donatello Valdez Jr.(half-nephew)Solomon Calligaris Valdez(half-nephew)Amber Robinson-Anderson(step-niece)AffiliationThe Valdez FamilyBiographical informationMarital statusDivorced (single)Date of birthUnknownPlace of birthUnknownDate of deathUnknownDate of deathUnknownPhysical descriptionSpeciesUnknownGenderUnknownHeightUnknownWeightUnknownEye colorUnknownIgnacio Valdez is a recurring character on Amateurs. He is the older gay half-brother of Donatello Valdez and first-born child and eldest son to Diego Valdez. His mother is Anya Valdez who died in childbirth with Delfina. He is a lawyer and has recently left his husband of six years of marriage after catching him in bed with his tennis partner. He is looking to start his life anew by soul-searching while helping his brother through his various life problems.
